## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New cmdlet / feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Baseline template (new or updated security baseline)
- [ ] Documentation / non-code change

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the EasyTCM patterns (Public/Private cmdlets, Invoke-TCMGraphRequest)
- [ ] I have tested against a real TCM tenant (or mocked the API responses)
- [ ] I have added/updated Pester tests for my changes
- [ ] I have updated the README if I added/changed a public cmdlet
- [ ] PSScriptAnalyzer reports no new warnings
